'''''Galaxy of Fear: Ghost of the Jedi''''' is the fifth book in the young readers ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Fear]]'' series.

==Publisher's summary==
''Tash, Zak, and their uncle Hoole are on the run from evil Imperial scientist Borborygmus Gog. The only place to hide is on Nespis 8, an abandoned space station.''

''There used to be a giant Jedi library on Nespis 8. According to Deevee, the library is still there, but it's cursed…and haunted by the ghost of a Jedi.''

''If they can find the library, maybe Tash and Zak can find a way to stop Gog.''

''But something evil dwells on Nespis 8.''

''And it's much scarier than a Jedi ghost.''

==Plot summary==
Looking for help against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], [[Tash Arranda/Legends|Tash Arranda]] contacts her anonymous [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] friend "Forceflow", who has helped her over the past [[Standard year/Legends|year]] with information about the [[The Force/Legends|Force]] and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. She arranges a rendezvous in the ancient [[Nespis VIII|space station of Nespis VIII]], a sprawling [[City/Legends|city]] frequented by [[Treasure hunting/Legends|treasure hunters]] seeking the fabled Jedi library of old. With the help of a [[Force ghost/Legends|Jedi spirit]], [[Aidan Bok]], Tash discovers she is [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], and also that Forceflow is in fact the evil [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Borborygmus Gog]], who tries to lure Tash into one of his insidious experimental devices, an [[Essence Stealer|essence stealer]] that would extract her [[Living Force/Legends|life force]].
